summary: Read-only P1-11 UI/observability comparison completed. Current observatory has graph-first UI and existing graph verifier passes, but visible UI is not P1-11 compliant: most required Korean status bands, stale/latest markers, evidence paths, remediation fields, and node-to-evidence drilldowns are missing from the structured UI; existing verifier is API-only for graph/state/health and does not assert the full Korean DOM/screenshot band set.
decisions: Used bundled Node runtime because node/npm are not on PATH.
Treat current UI as partial graph visibility, not P1-11 readiness.
next_steps: Add Korean status bands for every required P0/P1/final-readiness state.
Wire observatory/API to current state artifacts and remediation fields.
Add DOM/screenshot verifier for the full band set.
